query: Broccoli, some cashews, and a bunch of mint. Some Indian dish?

queries: Here is a great Indian-style broccoli and cashew curry recipe with fresh mint:
Here is a delicious Indian broccoli stir-fry recipe with cashews and mint chutney:
Here is a flavorful mint cashew broccoli sabzi recipe:

recommendation.headline: Malai Broccoli is your best bet tonight, it's built almost exactly around your broccoli, cashews, and mint.
recommendation.why_it_fits: This is the one recipe on the list that actually uses all three of your ingredients, broccoli as the star, cashews blended into the creamy marinade, and mint in the chutney served alongside. It's an Indian appetizer, which matches what you're after, and it doesn't lean on a long list of things you probably don't have.

missing_items.note: needed for the malai marinade, plain yogurt works fine if you don't have cream
forms the base paste, skip garlic in a pinch but ginger is worth having
some versions use a bit of grated cheese for richness, fine to leave out

recommendation.how_to_use_sources: Follow the Malai Broccoli recipe on mygingergarlickitchen.com start to finish, it already includes the mint chutney to serve on the side, so you don't need to borrow from anywhere else.

query: Broccoli, cashews, and mint. One of those melt-in-your-mouth Indian restaurant starters?

queries: Here is a melt-in-your-mouth Indian restaurant starter recipe using broccoli, cashews, and mint:
Here is an Indian-style broccoli cashew appetizer recipe with mint chutney:
Here is a creamy Indian starter recipe featuring broccoli and cashew paste:

recommendation.headline: Malai broccoli is exactly that melt-in-your-mouth Indian starter, and the mygingergarlickitchen version is the one that actually works fresh mint into the cashew marinade itself.
recommendation.why_it_fits: You want broccoli, cashews, and mint in one dish, and this recipe blends all three together into the marinade rather than treating mint as an afterthought chutney. The cashew paste gives you that rich, creamy coating that turns crisp-tender broccoli into a soft, melt-in-your-mouth bite once roasted or air fried. It is built specifically as a restaurant-style starter, which is what you asked for.

missing_items.note: this thickens the marinade so it clings to the broccoli, use whichever you have on hand, hung curd is lighter, cream cheese richer
adds the signature malai richness, full-fat coconut cream works if you want it dairy free
gives the marinade extra stretch and a subtle savory note, you can skip it and the dish still works

recommendation.how_to_use_sources: Follow the mygingergarlickitchen.com Malai Broccoli page start to finish, it already builds the mint-cashew marinade you want. If you'd like extra insurance on getting a crisp, restaurant-style char without an oven, peek at the Fun FOOD Frolic air fryer malai broccoli page for its air fryer time and temperature, then swap that cooking step in.

recipe.title: Air Fryer Malai Broccoli - My Food Story

alternatives.reason: pick this one if you'd rather use a hung curd and cream marinade with mint served on the side as a dipping chutney instead of blended in
good option if you want a more classic tandoori spice profile with garam masala leading the flavor over the mint
